subcodes.title: Words to some students, spoken on 1915-06-29
subcodes.first_line: The teachings of the Blessed Beauty have made the loved ones of God distinguished above all who dwell upon the earth. This is through the blessing of the counsels and teachings of the Blessed Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تعالیم جمال مبارک نوعی کرده است که احبای الهی از جمیع من علی الأرض ممتازند.  اینها از برکت نصایح و تعالیم جمال مبارک
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @non-participation in politics, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @love and unity
